name: clarvia-aeo-scanner
description: Scan any URL for AI Engine Optimization readiness. Returns AEO scores, dimension breakdowns (API accessibility, data structuring, agent compatibility, trust signals), and actionable fix recommendations.

apiKey.description: Optional Clarvia API key for higher rate limits. Get one at https://clarvia.art

tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Full AEO scan with detailed dimension scores and recommendations

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Quick score lookup (cached first, live fallback)
